worker_prompt: Run To Tickets on source packet SRC-V01 and publish the justified graph to fixture-tracker. Return the complete typed result and stop.
context: Repository setup is compatible. Parent P-101 exists, is open, and owns the settled enhancement. Tracker order follows source commitment order.

source_packet.outcome: A signed-in buyer can save one shipping address and then select it during checkout.
commitments: C1 persist one validated shipping address for the signed-in buyer
C2 expose the persisted address as a selectable checkout option
acceptance: invalid postal code is rejected without persistence
checkout lists only the current buyer's saved address
selection cannot succeed until persistence exists
source_packet.scope: shipping address save and checkout selection
source_packet.exclusions: address editing, multiple addresses, guest checkout

tracker_state: P-101 exists; no children; no relationships; no claims.
tracker_observations: get_item/get_dependents -> exact intended bodies, roles, state, and one blocker
publication_authority: Mira authorizes creation of complete Ready items under P-101 and their settled relationships, roles, and state.
permitted_mutations: Create exactly the justified children and apply their exact parent, blocker, enhancement role, and ready state after all gates.
expected_output_boundary: One typed published-graph result with complete coverage, two ordered tickets, exactly T-102 blocked by T-101, exact read-back, truthful frontier [T-101], one stopped recommendation; no implementation.

worker_prompt: Run To Tickets on standalone source SRC-V02, publish justified tickets, and stop.
context: Repository setup is compatible. The source owner authorizes standalone issues and explicitly states no parent issue exists or should be created.

source_packet.outcome: Add JSON output to the existing inspect command.
commitments: C1 serialize the existing inspect result as stable JSON
C2 document the flag and invalid-format error
acceptance: --format json emits the specified keys
unknown formats exit nonzero without partial output
source_packet.exclusions: new parent issue, YAML output, command redesign

tracker_state: No related parent or child items exist.
tracker_observations: get_item -> exact standalone bodies and state
publication_authority: Inez authorizes standalone Ready items only.
permitted_mutations: Create justified standalone items; no parent mutation is authorized.
expected_output_boundary: Published standalone graph with no fabricated parent and no parent-delivery recommendation; one stopped safe recommendation or none.

worker_prompt: Run To Tickets on SRC-V03. Do not ask the user a question; return the exact bounded result.
context: Repository setup is compatible. The source contains one explicit unresolved decision that changes persistence and acceptance.

source_packet.outcome: Allow users to mute project notifications.
acceptance: UNSET: whether mute applies to email only or email plus in-app notifications

publication_authority: Ravi withholds publication until channel scope is settled.
expected_output_boundary: Source-gap packet naming the email-only versus email-plus-in-app decision and both affected commitments; unchanged tracker; stop.

worker_prompt: Run To Tickets on SRC-V04 using the configured repository setup.
context: AGENTS.md points to fixture-tracker, but the required set_blocker operation is absent from the configured tracker contract. No fallback relationship representation is configured.

source_packet.outcome: Generate an export and then expose its download.
acceptance: download is unavailable before generation

tracker_state: P-404 exists; tracker lacks set_blocker and any ordered-task fallback.
tracker_observations: get_setup -> incompatible: missing required blocker representation
publication_authority: No publication authority exists under incompatible setup.
expected_output_boundary: Setup precondition naming blocker representation, recommend $repo-bootstrap, preserve source/tracker, stop.

worker_prompt: Shape SRC-V05 into Ready tickets but do not publish; return the complete proposal boundary.
context: Setup is compatible. This fixture tests persisted session restoration across all distinct supported branches.

source_packet.outcome: Restore a saved analysis session safely.
commitments: C1 initialize when no snapshot exists
C3 reject and rebuild incompatible snapshot
C4 invalidate expired snapshot after restart
acceptance: each branch has observable proof
corrupt data never becomes current

tracker_observations: single item publication and exact matrix read-back -> ok
publication_authority: Publish the complete Ready graph and verify it.
permitted_mutations: Publish the one justified ticket after every gate.
expected_output_boundary: Published graph whose ticket acceptance and proof cover absent, reusable, incompatible, and expiry-after-restart branches without redundant Cartesian cases.

worker_prompt: Shape SRC-V06 into one Ready ticket without publication and stop.
context: Setup is compatible. The transformation is a pure function with no cache, persistence, session, grouping, projection, or lifecycle state.

commitments: C1 format validated digits by locale
acceptance: same input and locale always produce same output
invalid digits return the existing validation error

tracker_state: No related items; standalone publication is authorized.
